summary: This document outlines the Usability Evaluation Plan for a medical device, detailing procedures for formative and summative evaluations prior to release. It defines critical tasks, hazard-related use scenarios, and compliance requirements based on ISO 14971 risk management standards. The plan specifies how user testing will be conducted to validate safety and usability of the user interface.
